action.description: send=answer a blocked prompt; wait=busy/not blocked; done=configured goal achieved; escalate=hand back to human; suggest=recommend without acting

text.description: Literal characters to type (may be empty or contain spaces). Sent before keys.

keys.description: tmux key names sent after text, in order (e.g. ["Enter"], ["Down","Enter"], ["1"]).

safe.description: false for destructive/irreversible/ambiguous actions — forces escalation.

reason.description: One concise sentence explaining the pane state and the chosen action.

pane_state.description: Observable state of the target pane.

goal_status.description: Progress of the exact configured goal.

risk.description: Risk level of the proposed action.

evidence.description: Short observable facts from the pane supporting the decision; use an empty array when none are available.
